style: 32x32 pixel art icon, lucha libre wrestling theme meets food/kitchen. Warm earth palette: gold ochre, deep red, ember orange, charcoal, cream highlights. Transparent background. Crisp pixel edges, NES/SNES era aesthetic, bold readable silhouette, slight depth via 3-tone shading. No text, no card frame, subject centered.
negative: blurry, photo, gradient noise, watermark, text, signature, modern UI, low contrast, soft edges, anti-aliased, 3D render, fancy script

ingredients.corn-masa: ball of golden corn masa dough, slight steam, lucha mask floating above
ingredients.flour: small linen sack of flour with red drawstring, flour puff
ingredients.tortilla: stack of three warm tortillas, top one slightly curled, lucha mask folded inside
ingredients.rice: wooden bowl of fluffy white rice, single steam swirl
ingredients.beef-chuck: raw cut of beef chuck on a wood block, marbled, with tiny championship belt wrapped
ingredients.pork: slab of fatty pork shoulder, pink and white striped, ember glow
ingredients.chicken: whole raw chicken wearing a small luchador mask, eyes side-eyeing
ingredients.onion: yellow onion mid-tear, dramatic teardrop pixel, peeled layer
ingredients.garlic: head of garlic with one clove flexing like a muscle
ingredients.cilantro: bright green cilantro sprig, dynamic leaves
ingredients.sugar: white sugar cube with red mask outline, sparkle
ingredients.cinnamon: rolled cinnamon stick, warm brown, ember at one end
ingredients.chili: red chili pepper, fierce eyes, ember tip
ingredients.habanero: orange habanero with snarl, tiny flame above stem
ingredients.lime: halved bright green lime, sour expression on cut face
ingredients.salt: stout salt shaker with red top, single salt grain mid-air
ingredients.butter: stick of yellow butter on wax paper, melting corner
ingredients.lard: tin pail of white lard, slight ooze
ingredients.tomato: red tomato with green leaves, slight smug face
ingredients.cheese: yellow cheese wedge with classic holes, lucha mask faintly visible on side
ingredients.poptart-of-pain: frosted toaster pastry with skull sprinkle, menacing red icing
ingredients.raw-celery: single celery stalk with leafy top, crunchy

ingredient_stages.raw: in its raw uncooked state, vivid color
ingredient_stages.chopped: neatly diced into chunks on a cutting board
ingredient_stages.cooking: sizzling in oil with small steam wisps, partially browned
ingredient_stages.burnt: charred black with smoke wisp, sad expression

actions.mise-en-place: orderly prep board with three small bowls of chopped ingredients and a knife
actions.pressure-cooker: old-school pressure cooker with steam hissing out top, dial at high
actions.open-flame: roaring orange flame with grill grate silhouette
actions.guest-chef: Abuela Inferno: tough grandma in apron wielding a fiery wooden spoon, fierce eyes
actions.salt-bae: silhouette arm sprinkling salt with theatrical flourish, single grain trail
actions.kitchen-fire: kitchen panel engulfed in orange flame, lone pot flying
actions.taste-test: wooden tasting spoon with a single drop, sneaky eye peeking
actions.snack-break: chef's hat tilted, hand holding a small bag of chips, satisfied
actions.family-recipe: open leather recipe book with handwriting and a glowing page
actions.spice-rack: row of spice jars with red caps on wooden shelf, one jar tipped
actions.bonus-tip: tip jar of peso coins, one coin mid-flip
actions.crowd-pleaser: stylized roaring crowd silhouette with one luchador fist raised
actions.composter: wooden compost bin with green leaves and a small worm peeking
actions.sous-chef: second cook in white coat handing over a knife
actions.pantry-raid: open pantry door with flashlight beam, shelves of ingredients
actions.knife-sharpener: diagonal sharpening rod with knife sparking down it
actions.auto-dicer: boxy retro-futurist countertop dicer with chopping blades, single LED
actions.med-kit: small white kit with red cross, bandage and pill bottle

recipes.tamale-tornado: tamale wrestler wrapped in cornhusk, lucha mask, mid-spin with wind streaks
recipes.pan-dulce-punch: round pan dulce concha throwing a haymaker, pink sugar shell cracked at knuckles
recipes.empanada-enforcer: burly empanada doorman, crossed arms, golden crust, lucha mask
recipes.burrito-bouncer: massive foil-wrapped burrito with arms crossed, bouncer pose, sunglasses
recipes.habanero-haymaker: habanero wrestler with flaming gloves, snarling mid-punch, sparks
recipes.churro-chainsaw: long churro wielded like a chainsaw, sugar crystals as teeth, cinnamon smoke
recipes.wild-dish: abstract unidentifiable food blob with question mark, lucha mask, suspicious eyes

recipe_qualities.perfect: masterful presentation, glistening, halo of small sparkles, victorious pose, vivid colors
recipe_qualities.good: solid execution, clean look, neutral palette
recipe_qualities.plain: underwhelming, slightly dull colors, slumped posture, no shine
recipe_qualities.burnt: charred black edges, smoke wisps, soot, defeated expression, ashen tones

chef_portraits.chef-rivera: Chef Rivera 'El Cocinero': masked luchador chef in white apron with gold trim, fierce mustache, holding wooden spoon, gold-and-red mask
chef_portraits.el-bistec: El Bistec 'The Rival Cut': hulking butcher luchador in blood-red apron, raw-meat-themed mask, cleaver crossed across chest
